creator: fanf@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Mon, 27 Apr 2009, Wesley Shields wrote:

> I can't seem to reproduce this.  With an empty MANPATH I'm able to view
> the documentation using "git help tag" or "git help <foo>".

Below is a script of me demonstrating the problem. I wonder if you have a
symlink from /usr/local/share/man to /usr/local/man ?

$ pkg_info -I 'git*'
git-1.6.0.1         Distributed source code management tool
$ env -i PATH=/bin:/usr/bin:/usr/local/bin truss -fae -o trace git help tag
No manual entry for git-tag
$ grep /man trace
62278: execve("/usr/local/libexec/git-core/man", [ "man", "git-tag" ], [ "MANPATH=/usr/local/share/man:", "PATH=/usr/local/libexec/git-core:/bin:/usr/bin:/usr/local/bin" ]) ERR#2 'No such file or directory'
62278: open("/etc/manpath.config",O_RDONLY,0666) = 5 (0x5)
62278: read(5,"# $FreeBSD: src/gnu/usr.bin/man/"...,4096) = 1169 (0x491)
62278: stat("/usr/local/share/man",0xbfbfed98)   ERR#2 'No such file or directory'
$ locate git-tag.1
/usr/local/man/man1/git-tag.1.gz
$

Um, the first agument in the execve seems to reveal a bug in truss. kdump
says...

 62211 git      CALL  execve(0xbfbfe008,0xbfbfe4b0,0x2861a140)
 62211 git      NAMI  "/usr/local/libexec/git-core/man"
 62211 git      RET   execve -1 errno 2 No such file or directory
 62211 git      CALL  execve(0xbfbfe008,0xbfbfe4b0,0x2861a140)
 62211 git      NAMI  "/home/fanf2/bin/man"
 62211 git      RET   execve -1 errno 2 No such file or directory
 62211 git      CALL  execve(0xbfbfe008,0xbfbfe4b0,0x2861a140)
 62211 git      NAMI  "/usr/X11R6/bin/man"
 62211 git      RET   execve -1 errno 2 No such file or directory
 62211 git      CALL  execve(0xbfbfe008,0xbfbfe4b0,0x2861a140)
 62211 git      NAMI  "/usr/local/sbin/man"
 62211 git      RET   execve -1 errno 2 No such file or directory
 62211 git      CALL  execve(0xbfbfe008,0xbfbfe4b0,0x2861a140)
 62211 git      NAMI  "/usr/local/bin/man"
 62211 git      RET   execve -1 errno 2 No such file or directory
 62211 git      CALL  execve(0xbfbfe008,0xbfbfe4b0,0x2861a140)
 62211 git      NAMI  "/usr/sbin/man"
 62211 git      RET   execve -1 errno 2 No such file or directory
 62211 git      CALL  execve(0xbfbfe008,0xbfbfe4b0,0x2861a140)
 62211 git      NAMI  "/usr/bin/man"
 62211 git      NAMI  "/libexec/ld-elf.so.1"
 62211 man      RET   execve 0

Tony.
--
